title: Why Investors Should Buy Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Stock Now
text: Consistent focus on innovative solutions and services as well as R&D to continue driving growth for Otis Worldwide (OTIS).

title: KONE: Structural Compounder Down 32% From Peak After Inflation, China Fears
text: KONE stock has fallen 32% below its 52-week high to a level last seen in March 2020; the P/E is 26.2x and the Dividend Yield is 3.5%. Elevators are a structurally-growing sector backed by trends like urbanization. KONE's Maintenance base grew another 4.9% in 2021.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Down 7.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
